stemHtml: An aircraft is fitted with a multimode receiver (MMR) with a single control panel for use with ILS, MLS and GNSS approaches. What is an advantage of this over individual systems for each approach type?

options.a: An approach can be flown using the combined signals of all three systems.
options.c: The crew need NOT know which type of approach is being flown.
options.d: The approach can be flown more accurately.
